title: Sitecore CDP Guest
description: Schema representing a guest profile in Sitecore Customer Data Platform. Guests are the core entity storing personal, behavioral, and transactional data used for personalization, segmentation, and reporting.

guestRef.description: The unique reference identifier for the guest, assigned by Sitecore CDP upon creation

email.description: The email address of the guest, used as the primary identifier for identity resolution

firstName.description: The guest's first name as stored in the CDP profile

lastName.description: The guest's last name as stored in the CDP profile

dateOfBirth.description: The guest's date of birth in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD)

phoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers associated with the guest profile

items.description: A phone number in E.164 or local format

identifiers.description: External identifiers that link this guest to source systems for identity resolution

dataExtensions.description: Named sets of custom key-value pairs attached to the guest profile for storing additional structured information

orders.description: Order records associated with this guest capturing purchase history

sessions.description: Behavioral sessions recorded for this guest capturing browsing and interaction events

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the guest profile was created in CDP

modifiedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the guest profile was last modified

GuestIdentifier.description: An external identifier linking a guest to a specific source system or identity provider

provider.description: The name of the identity provider or source system (e.g., email, phone, loyalty)

id.description: The identifier value from the external system

expiryDate.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp after which this identifier is no longer valid

DataExtension.description: A named set of custom key-value pairs attached to a guest or order record for storing additional structured information

name.description: The name identifying this data extension, unique per guest

key.description: The key for a specific field within the data extension

value.description: The string value associated with the key in this data extension

Order.description: A purchase transaction record associated with a guest profile

orderRef.description: The unique reference identifier assigned by CDP for this order

referenceId.description: The external order reference identifier from the commerce platform. Immutable after creation.

status.description: The current fulfillment status of the order

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for order monetary values

totalPrice.description: The total price of the order including taxes and shipping

orderedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was placed. Immutable after creation.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the order record was created in CDP

items.description: The product line items included in this order

OrderItem.description: A product line item within a guest order

itemRef.description: The unique reference identifier for this order item in CDP

sku.description: The product stock keeping unit (SKU) or identifier

name.description: The display name of the product at time of purchase

quantity.description: The quantity of the product purchased in this line item

price.description: The unit price of the product at time of purchase

totalPrice.description: The total price for this line item (unit price multiplied by quantity)

Session.description: A behavioral session capturing a guest's activity within a visit to the application

sessionRef.description: The unique reference identifier for this session in CDP

channel.description: The channel through which the session was recorded

status.description: The current status of the session

startedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the session started

endedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the session ended

events.description: Behavioral events captured during this session

StreamEvent.description: A behavioral event captured from the Sitecore CDP Stream API within a guest session

meta_ref.description: The unique identifier for this event record in CDP

channel.description: The channel from which the event was received

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values in this event

page.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was recorded in CDP

ext.description: Custom extension data attached to the event. One extension per event type.
